title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird of Koah Labs argues that ad monetization, not subscriptions, is the right model for AI tools and that the real bottleneck for AI agents is human trust rather than technology. He raised $26M for Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform targeting AI tools, betting against the 2024 VC consensus favoring subscriptions.
